sourceBio: ceo @every | the only subscription you need to stay at the edge of AI
title: Dan Shipper · @danshipper

sentences.text: As of today, by U.S. government directive, access is limited to only ~20 pre-approved companies and @every is not on the list.
This appears to be a temporary situation while the government races to figure out a long-term policy for releasing frontier models with advanced capabilities.
I understand and applaud the need for some government oversight in making American infrastructure resilient to cyberattacks and other potential new threats from the misuse of these models.
However, I also strongly believe that widespread democratic access to frontier models is absolutely necessary to our country’s leading position in the AI race.
It’s also critical for allowing American workers to keep pace with the new skills they need to be productive in this era.

A world where advanced models are locked up only for use by the employees of AI giants and a select few companies is one where ambitious students, independent builders, and working professionals are denied the tools they need to learn, create, and compete to their fullest potential.

Also, speaking for @every and the community of developers and writers who share early access with us: Our job is to test these tools early so that we can prepare Americans for how to use them to their fullest extent.
If we lose access, we lose the ability to do that important job well.
Thankfully, both OpenAI and the government seem to be working to make broad access available soon.
We’ll be ready to vibe check when that happens :)

paragraphs.zh: 突发消息：OpenAI 宣布了 GPT-5.6 Sol！截至今天，根据 U.S. government 的指令，访问权限仅限于约 20 家预先批准的公司，而 @every 不在名单之列。这看来是一个临时情况，因为政府正争分夺秒地制定一项关于如何发布具备高级能力的 frontier models（前沿模型）的长期政策。我理解并赞赏政府监督的必要性，以增强 American 基础设施抵御 cyberattacks（网络攻击）以及这些模型被滥用可能带来的其他新威胁的韧性。然而，我也强烈相信，frontier models 的广泛民主化访问权，对于我们国家在 AI 竞赛中保持领先地位是绝对必要的。这对于让 American workers 跟上这个时代所需的新技能、保持生产力，也同样至关重要。一个只有 AI 巨头员工和少数被选中的公司才能使用 advanced models（先进模型）的世界，意味着有抱负的学生、独立建设者以及在职专业人士，将被剥夺他们充分学习、创造和竞争所需的工具。还有，代表 @every 以及那些与我们共享 early access（早期访问权限）的开发者和写作者社区发言：我们的工作，就是尽早测试这些工具，以便我们能够帮助 Americans 为如何最大程度地使用它们做好准备。如果我们失去访问权限，我们也就失去了把这项重要工作做好的能力。值得庆幸的是，OpenAI 和政府似乎都在努力，争取尽快提供广泛访问。等那发生时，我们会准备好来做个 vibe check :)
